summary: Independent QA accepts M7-MANUAL-PLAYTHROUGH-EVIDENCE-001 as truthful agent-operated local preview playthrough evidence and routing input only. The writer handoff does not claim product-owner or human manual acceptance approval, keeps formal/manual human judgment acceptance behind the M7 content-lock Human Gate where required, records build commit, seed source, scenario label, save/checkpoint visibility, platform, locale, resolution, and defect/limitation notes, and does not change product code, content data, balance, UI, save, release, telemetry, server/multiplayer, branding/commercial, or manual node battle scope.

tests_run.result: Clean worktree before QA handoff creation.

Diff contains only allowed process/task/message/state files: project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json, project/tasks/active/M7-MANUAL-PLAYTHROUGH-EVIDENCE-001.json, and M7 manual playthrough message/route JSON files.
No whitespace or patch formatting errors.
VALID writer REVIEW handoff on final reviewed branch state.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check of writer handoff evidence fields
tests_run.result: shape-ok; evidence includes build_commit, seed, scenario, save_checkpoints[6], duration, platform, locale, resolution, and defects[3].
Task registry lists M7-MANUAL-PLAYTHROUGH-EVIDENCE-001 as REVIEW.

tests_run.command: PowerShell forbidden-path scanner over git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD
tests_run.result: forbidden-scan-ok; no apps, packages, content-source, tools, .github, frozen docs, manifest/checksum/report, product code, content, UI, save, release, telemetry, server, mod, branding, commercial, or manual-node-battle path was changed.

Reviewed process-only commit chain: start route, record route, writer evidence, route to QA, and record QA route. Current reviewed head f56d8516 follows the route commit 7bfc0593 named in the review package.
Writer evidence build_commit exists and resolves to b49e8956732a00e87e395243cb9aace367670547.
Confirmed the scenario label and m5.composite.river-gate.v0 save/checkpoint identifiers exist in current repo surfaces/content; no product code was modified by this task.

tests_run.command: Review writer tests_run records for pnpm build:web, pnpm test:e2e, pnpm desktop:package
tests_run.result: Writer handoff records pnpm build:web exit 0 with existing chunk warning, pnpm test:e2e exit 0 with 23/23 Chromium tests passed, and pnpm desktop:package exit 0 with .tmp desktop package smoke output. QA did not rerun these write-producing commands during the read-only review.

tests_run.command: Read related M7 content-lock and content-fill task contracts
tests_run.result: Confirmed formal content lock acceptance and manual human judgment acceptance remain Human Gates; the Beta scenario/person/event set has three scenario candidates, so this QA ACCEPT must not be read as full scenario-by-scenario human approval.

acceptance_check.allowed_paths: PASS: actual diff is limited to task JSON, thread registry, goal/model state, and project/messages artifacts allowed by the task.
acceptance_check.forbidden_scope: PASS: no product code, package code, content-source data, balance tuning, UI fix, save migration, release artifact, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mod, branding/commercial decision, or manual node battle work appears in the diff.
acceptance_check.evidence_truthfulness: PASS: writer classifies the evidence as agent-operated local preview evidence, not product-owner/human manual acceptance approval.
acceptance_check.human_gate_boundary: PASS: task JSON keeps manual_acceptance_human_gate_required true; writer summary, decisions, risks, defects, and requested_action all route formal/manual human judgment acceptance to the M7 content-lock Human Gate if required.
acceptance_check.required_tests: PASS_WITH_QA_NOTE: writer recorded all required commands; QA reran task validate, list, ready, writer handoff validation, evidence shape check, git diff name/status/check, and forbidden-path checks. Writer handoff still records an earlier validate-handoff failure row, but the final reviewed writer handoff validates successfully.
acceptance_check.manual_node_battle: PASS: DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE is preserved and no reversal, spike, implementation, validation dependency, or blocking research path is introduced.
acceptance_check.p0_p1_culture_release: PASS: no P0/P1, major cultural-risk acceptance, irreversible migration, release/commercial question, or manual node battle reversal is introduced by the evidence branch.

decisions.decision: Accept the task as record/routing evidence, not as formal manual acceptance, product-owner approval, content lock approval, or release readiness.
If formal/manual human judgment acceptance is required, it remains a Human Gate under M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001; this task must not auto-approve it.
Accept the actual diff scope as process-only and within allowed paths.
Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE with no M7/M8 blocking work or reversal.

risks.summary: The collected evidence is local agent-operated preview evidence. It is not a human stopwatch manual playthrough, product-owner manual acceptance, content lock approval, release artifact, or production save artifact.
risks.mitigation: Preserve Human Gate routing for any formal/manual human judgment acceptance and require the lead/content-lock task to synthesize this only as evidence input.

risks.summary: The accepted Beta content set has three scenario candidates; this handoff records visible 1531 preview evidence and limitations, not full scenario-by-scenario human approval.
risks.mitigation: M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 and M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 must not claim complete human manual acceptance solely from this task.

risks.summary: Writer handoff records an earlier validate-handoff failure row instead of a final pass row, although QA reran validation and the final writer handoff is valid.
risks.mitigation: This QA handoff records the final validate-handoff pass; lead should rely on the QA validation result for final artifact validity.

requested_action: Lead may accept/integrate M7-MANUAL-PLAYTHROUGH-EVIDENCE-001 as truthful process evidence only. Preserve the Human Gate for any formal/manual human judgment acceptance and do not treat this as content lock approval, release readiness, or manual node battle reversal.
